req.title: Read patient (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall read a patient resource for patients in their care; reading outside their assignment shall be denied. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest test suite for Patient Resource Access Control
Requirement: A clinician shall read a patient resource for patients in their care;
             reading outside their assignment shall be denied.
             Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
import uuid


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / stubs
# (Replace with real imports from your application under test)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class AccessDeniedError(Exception):
    """Raised when a clinician attempts to access an unauthorised resource."""


class PatientNotFoundError(Exception):
    """Raised when the requested patient does not exist."""


class PatientResource:
    """Minimal patient resource model."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        patient_id: str,
        name: str,
        date_of_birth: datetime,
        weight_kg: float | None = None,
        height_cm: float | None = None,
        assigned_clinician_ids: list[str] | None = None,
        record_created_at: datetime | None = None,
        record_updated_at: datetime | None = None,
    ):
        self.patient_id = patient_id
        self.name = name
        self.date_of_birth = date_of_birth
        self.weight_kg = weight_kg
        self.height_cm = height_cm
        self.assigned_clinician_ids: list[str] = assigned_clinician_ids or []
        self.record_created_at = record_created_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.record_updated_at = record_updated_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class PatientRepository:
    """In-memory patient store used by the service."""

    def __init__(self, patients: list[PatientResource] | None = None):
        self._store: dict[str, PatientResource] = {
            p.patient_id: p for p in (patients or [])
        }

    def get(self, patient_id: str) -> PatientResource:
        try:
            return self._store[patient_id]
        except KeyError:
            raise PatientNotFoundError(f"Patient {patient_id} not found.")

    def add(self, patient: PatientResource) -> None:
        self._store[patient.patient_id] = patient


class PatientService:
    """
    Application service that enforces access-control before returning a
    patient resource to a clinician.
    """

    def __init__(self, repository: PatientRepository):
        self._repo = repository

    def read_patient(self, clinician_id: str, patient_id: str) -> PatientResource:
        """
        Returns the PatientResource if the clinician is assigned to the patient.
        Raises AccessDeniedError otherwise.
        """
        patient = self._repo.get(patient_id)          # raises PatientNotFoundError
        if clinician_id not in patient.assigned_clinician_ids:
            raise AccessDeniedError(
                f"Clinician {clinician_id} is not authorised to read "
                f"patient {patient_id}."
            )
        return patient


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

CLINICIAN_A = "clinician-001"
CLINICIAN_B = "clinician-002"
UNASSIGNED_CLINICIAN = "clinician-999"

EPOCH = datetime(1970, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
FAR_FUTURE = datetime(9999, 12, 31, 23, 59, 59, 999999, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
MIN_VALID_TIMESTAMP = EPOCH
MAX_VALID_TIMESTAMP = FAR_FUTURE


def _make_patient(
    assigned_clinicians: list[str],
    patient_id: str | None = None,
    dob: datetime | None = None,
    weight_kg: float | None = 70.0,
    height_cm: float | None = 170.0,
    created_at: datetime | None = None,
    updated_at: datetime | None = None,
) -> PatientResource:
    return PatientResource(
        patient_id=patient_id or str(uuid.uuid4()),
        name="Test Patient",
        date_of_birth=dob or datetime(1980, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
        weight_kg=weight_kg,
        height_cm=height_cm,
        assigned_clinician_ids=assigned_clinicians,
        record_created_at=created_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc),
        record_updated_at=updated_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )


@pytest.fixture()
def patient_assigned_to_a() -> PatientResource:
    return _make_patient(assigned_clinicians=[CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="patient-alpha")


@pytest.fixture()
def patient_assigned_to_both() -> PatientResource:
    return _make_patient(
        assigned_clinicians=[CLINICIAN_A, CLINICIAN_B], patient_id="patient-beta"
    )


@pytest.fixture()
def patient_no_clinicians() -> PatientResource:
    return _make_patient(assigned_clinicians=[], patient_id="patient-gamma")


@pytest.fixture()
def service(patient_assigned_to_a, patient_assigned_to_both, patient_no_clinicians):
    repo = PatientRepository(
        [patient_assigned_to_a, patient_assigned_to_both, patient_no_clinicians]
    )
    return PatientService(repo)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Happy-path access-control tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestAuthorisedAccess:
    """Clinicians who ARE assigned to a patient may read that patient."""

    def test_assigned_clinician_can_read_patient(self, service, patient_assigned_to_a):
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-alpha")
        assert result.patient_id == "patient-alpha"

    def test_both_assigned_clinicians_can_read_shared_patient(
        self, service, patient_assigned_to_both
    ):
        result_a = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-beta")
        result_b = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_B, "patient-beta")
        assert result_a.patient_id == result_b.patient_id == "patient-beta"

    def test_returned_resource_contains_expected_fields(
        self, service, patient_assigned_to_a
    ):
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-alpha")
        assert result.name is not None
        assert result.date_of_birth is not None
        assert result.assigned_clinician_ids is not None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Denied-access tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestUnauthorisedAccess:
    """Clinicians who are NOT assigned to a patient must be denied."""

    def test_unassigned_clinician_is_denied(self, service):
        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            service.read_patient(UNASSIGNED_CLINICIAN, "patient-alpha")

    def test_clinician_b_denied_when_only_a_assigned(self, service):
        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_B, "patient-alpha")

    def test_patient_with_no_clinicians_denies_everyone(self, service):
        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-gamma")

    def test_empty_string_clinician_id_is_denied(self, service):
        with pytest.raises((AccessDeniedError, PatientNotFoundError, ValueError)):
            service.read_patient("", "patient-alpha")

    def test_none_clinician_id_raises(self, service):
        with pytest.raises((AccessDeniedError, PatientNotFoundError, TypeError)):
            service.read_patient(None, "patient-alpha")  # type: ignore[arg-type]

    def test_error_message_does_not_leak_patient_data(self, service):
        """Security: denial errors must not expose patient PII."""
        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError) as exc_info:
            service.read_patient(UNASSIGNED_CLINICIAN, "patient-alpha")
        error_text = str(exc_info.value).lower()
        assert "test patient" not in error_text  # patient name must not appear
        assert "1980" not in error_text            # DOB must not appear

    def test_access_denied_error_type_is_correct(self, service):
        """Ensure the exact error type (not a subclass of a broad exception) is raised."""
        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_B, "patient-alpha")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Non-existent / invalid patient IDs
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestInvalidPatientId:

    def test_nonexistent_patient_raises_not_found(self, service):
        with pytest.raises(PatientNotFoundError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-does-not-exist")

    def test_empty_patient_id_raises(self, service):
        with pytest.raises((PatientNotFoundError, ValueError)):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "")

    def test_none_patient_id_raises(self, service):
        with pytest.raises((PatientNotFoundError, TypeError)):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, None)  # type: ignore[arg-type]

    def test_sql_injection_string_is_not_found(self, service):
        with pytest.raises(PatientNotFoundError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "' OR '1'='1")

    def test_very_long_patient_id_is_not_found(self, service):
        with pytest.raises(PatientNotFoundError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "x" * 10_000)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Timestamp boundary tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestTimestampBoundaries:
    """
    date_of_birth, record_created_at, and record_updated_at must be handled
    correctly at extreme values.
    """

    # --- date_of_birth ---

    def test_read_patient_with_epoch_dob(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-epoch-dob", dob=EPOCH)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-epoch-dob")
        assert result.date_of_birth == EPOCH

    def test_read_patient_with_far_future_dob(self, service):
        """Edge: pre-registered future birth (e.g. birth plan record)."""
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-future-dob", dob=FAR_FUTURE)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-future-dob")
        assert result.date_of_birth == FAR_FUTURE

    def test_read_patient_with_dob_just_before_midnight(self, service):
        near_midnight = datetime(2000, 1, 1, 23, 59, 59, 999999, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-near-midnight", dob=near_midnight)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-near-midnight")
        assert result.date_of_birth == near_midnight

    def test_read_patient_with_dob_at_midnight(self, service):
        at_midnight = datetime(2000, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-at-midnight", dob=at_midnight)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-at-midnight")
        assert result.date_of_birth == at_midnight

    # --- record_created_at ---

    def test_record_created_at_epoch(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-created-epoch", created_at=EPOCH
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-created-epoch")
        assert result.record_created_at == EPOCH

    def test_record_created_at_far_future(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-created-future", created_at=FAR_FUTURE
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-created-future")
        assert result.record_created_at == FAR_FUTURE

    # --- record_updated_at ---

    def test_record_updated_at_equals_created_at(self, service):
        """Boundary: record never updated after creation."""
        ts = datetime(2023, 3, 14, 9, 26, 53, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-never-updated", created_at=ts, updated_at=ts
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-never-updated")
        assert result.record_updated_at == result.record_created_at

    def test_record_updated_at_one_microsecond_after_created(self, service):
        ts = datetime(2023, 3, 14, 9, 26, 53, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
        ts_plus_one_us = ts + timedelta(microseconds=1)
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A],
            patient_id="p-one-us-later",
            created_at=ts,
            updated_at=ts_plus_one_us,
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-one-us-later")
        assert result.record_updated_at > result.record_created_at
        assert (result.record_updated_at - result.record_created_at) == timedelta(
            microseconds=1
        )

    def test_timezone_aware_timestamps_preserved(self, service):
        """Timestamps must retain timezone info (not be naively truncated)."""
        ts = datetime(2023, 6, 1, 12, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-tz-aware", created_at=ts, updated_at=ts
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-tz-aware")
        assert result.record_created_at.tzinfo is not None
        assert result.record_updated_at.tzinfo is not None

    def test_non_utc_timezone_timestamp(self, service):
        """Record timestamps expressed in a non-UTC timezone must be preserved."""
        ist = timezone(timedelta(hours=5, minutes=30))
        ts_ist = datetime(2023, 6, 1, 17, 30, 0, tzinfo=ist)
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-ist-tz", created_at=ts_ist, updated_at=ts_ist
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-ist-tz")
        assert result.record_created_at.utcoffset() == timedelta(hours=5, minutes=30)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Numeric element boundary tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestNumericBoundaries:
    """weight_kg and height_cm boundary and edge cases."""

    # --- weight_kg ---

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("weight", [0.0, 0.001, 0.1])
    def test_weight_near_zero_is_readable(self, service, weight):
        repo = service._repo
        pid = f"p-weight-{weight}"
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id=pid, weight_kg=weight)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, pid)
        assert result.weight_kg == pytest.approx(weight)

    def test_weight_exactly_zero(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-weight-zero", weight_kg=0.0)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-weight-zero")
        assert result.weight_kg == 0.0

    def test_weight_typical_adult(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-weight-typical", weight_kg=70.5)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-weight-typical")
        assert result.weight_kg == pytest.approx(70.5)

    def test_weight_maximum_realistic_value(self, service):
        """Upper realistic bound: 700 kg (beyond known human records for safety margin)."""
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-weight-max", weight_kg=700.0)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-weight-max")
        assert result.weight_kg == pytest.approx(700.0)

    def test_weight_none_is_readable(self, service):
        """Weight may be absent (e.g. not yet recorded)."""
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-weight-none", weight_kg=None)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-weight-none")
        assert result.weight_kg is None

    def test_weight_high_precision_decimal(self, service):
        """Floating-point precision: value should survive a round-trip."""
        weight = 72.123456789
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-weight-precision", weight_kg=weight)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-weight-precision")
        assert result.weight_kg == pytest.approx(weight, rel=1e-6)

    # --- height_cm ---

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("height", [0.0, 1.0, 30.0])
    def test_height_near_zero_is_readable(self, service, height):
        repo = service._repo
        pid = f"p-height-{height}"
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id=pid, height_cm=height)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, pid)
        assert result.height_cm == pytest.approx(height)

    def test_height_typical_adult(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-height-typical", height_cm=175.0)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-height-typical")
        assert result.height_cm == pytest.approx(175.0)

    def test_height_maximum_realistic_value(self, service):
        """Upper realistic bound: 300 cm."""
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-height-max", height_cm=300.0)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-height-max")
        assert result.height_cm == pytest.approx(300.0)

    def test_height_none_is_readable(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-height-none", height_cm=None)
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-height-none")
        assert result.height_cm is None

    def test_both_weight_and_height_none(self, service):
        """Both numeric fields absent – still readable by authorised clinician."""
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient(
            [CLINICIAN_A],
            patient_id="p-no-measurements",
            weight_kg=None,
            height_cm=None,
        )
        repo.add(p)
        result = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "p-no-measurements")
        assert result.weight_kg is None
        assert result.height_cm is None

    # --- combined numeric + access-denial ---

    def test_unassigned_clinician_denied_even_with_boundary_weight(self, service):
        repo = service._repo
        p = _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id="p-denied-numeric", weight_kg=0.0)
        repo.add(p)
        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_B, "p-denied-numeric")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Concurrent / multi-patient access scenarios
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestMultiPatientScenarios:

    def test_clinician_reads_only_their_own_patients(self, service):
        """Regression: iterating all patients must respect per-patient assignment."""
        patients = [
            _make_patient([CLINICIAN_A], patient_id=f"pa-{i}") for i in range(5)
        ]
        patients += [
            _make_patient([CLINICIAN_B], patient_id=f"pb-{i}") for i in range(5)
        ]
        repo = PatientRepository(patients)
        svc = PatientService(repo)

        for i in range(5):
            result = svc.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, f"pa-{i}")
            assert result.patient_id == f"pa-{i}"

        for i in range(5):
            with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
                svc.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, f"pb-{i}")

    def test_reading_same_patient_twice_returns_consistent_data(self, service):
        r1 = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-alpha")
        r2 = service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-alpha")
        assert r1.patient_id == r2.patient_id
        assert r1.name == r2.name
        assert r1.date_of_birth == r2.date_of_birth

    def test_large_number_of_assigned_clinicians(self):
        """Stress: patient assigned to many clinicians – all may read."""
        many_clinicians = [f"clinician-{i}" for i in range(1000)]
        patient = _make_patient(many_clinicians, patient_id="p-many-clinicians")
        repo = PatientRepository([patient])
        svc = PatientService(repo)

        for cid in many_clinicians:
            result = svc.read_patient(cid, "p-many-clinicians")
            assert result.patient_id == "p-many-clinicians"

        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            svc.read_patient("clinician-9999", "p-many-clinicians")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Idempotency and side-effect tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestIdempotencyAndSideEffects:

    def test_read_does_not_modify_assigned_clinicians(self, service):
        before = list(service._repo.get("patient-alpha").assigned_clinician_ids)
        service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-alpha")
        after = list(service._repo.get("patient-alpha").assigned_clinician_ids)
        assert before == after

    def test_read_does_not_modify_timestamps(self, service):
        patient_before = service._repo.get("patient-alpha")
        created_before = patient_before.record_created_at
        updated_before = patient_before.record_updated_at

        service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_A, "patient-alpha")

        patient_after = service._repo.get("patient-alpha")
        assert patient_after.record_created_at == created_before
        assert patient_after.record_updated_at == updated_before

    def test_failed_read_does_not_modify_repository(self, service):
        patient_before = service._repo.get("patient-alpha")
        clinicians_before = list(patient_before.assigned_clinician_ids)

        with pytest.raises(AccessDeniedError):
            service.read_patient(CLINICIAN_B, "patient-alpha")

        patient_after = service._repo.get("patient-alpha")
        assert list(patient_after.assigned_clinician_ids) == clinicians_before
```

---

## Design rationale

| Test class | What it verifies |
|---|---|
| `TestAuthorisedAccess` | Happy-path: assigned clinicians receive the resource |
| `TestUnauthorisedAccess` | Core requirement: denial, error type, no PII leakage |
| `TestInvalidPatientId` | Robustness: non-existent IDs, injection strings, `None` |
| `TestTimestampBoundaries` | Epoch, far-future, microsecond precision, midnight, timezone-aware vs. naïve |
| `TestNumericBoundaries` | Zero, near-zero, `None`, typical, maximum realistic, floating-point precision for `weight_kg` / `height_cm` |
| `TestMultiPatientScenarios` | Cross-patient isolation, 1 000-clinician stress, consistency |
| `TestIdempotencyAndSideEffects` | Reads are non-mutating (timestamps and assignments unchanged) |

Key decisions:
- **`pytest.approx`** is used for all floating-point assertions to avoid IEEE-754 fragility.  
- **`pytest.mark.parametrize`** reduces duplication for near-zero numeric boundaries.  
- The **stub layer** (`PatientResource`, `PatientRepository`, `PatientService`) is intentionally thin so every test exercises real logic rather than mocks; swap the imports for your actual application classes without changing the test bodies.

Pytest test suite for Patient Resource Access Control
Requirement: A clinician shall read a patient resource for patients in their care;
             reading outside their assignment shall be denied.
             Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
import uuid

# Domain models / stubs
# (Replace with real imports from your application under test)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class PatientNotFoundError(Exception):

        record_created_at: datetime | None = None,
        record_updated_at: datetime | None = None,

        self.patient_id = patient_id
        self.name = name
        self.date_of_birth = date_of_birth

```python
"""
Pytest test suite for Patient Resource Access Control
Requirement: A clinician shall read a patient resource for patients in their care;
             reading outside their assignment shall be denied.
             Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.
"""

# Domain models / stubs

class AccessDeniedError(Exception):
    """Raised when a clinician attempts to access an unauthorised resource."""


class PatientNotFoundError(Exception):
    """Raised when the requested patient does not exist."""


class PatientResource:
    """Minimal patient resource model."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        patient_id: str,
        name: str,
        date_of_birth: datetime,
        weight_kg: float | None = None,
        height_cm: float | None = None,
        assigned_clinician_ids: list[str] | None = None,
        record_created_at: datetime | None = None,
        record_updated_at: datetime | None = None,
    ):
        self.patient_id = patient_id
        self.name = name
        self.date_of_birth = date_of_birth
        self.weight_kg = weight_kg
        self.height_cm = height_cm
        self.assigned_clinician_ids: list[str] = assigned_clinician_ids or []
        self.record_created_at = record_created_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.record_updated_at = record_updated_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class PatientRepository:
    """In-memory patient store used by the service."""

    def __init__(self, patients: list[PatientResource] | None = None):
        self._store: dict[str, PatientResource] = {
            p.patient_id: p for p in (patients or [])
        }

    def get(self, patient_id: str) -> PatientResource:
        try:
            return self._store[patient_id]
        except KeyError:
            raise PatientNotFoundError(f"Patient {patient_id} not found.")

    def add(self, patient: PatientResource) -> None:
        self._store[patient.patient_id] = patient


class PatientService:
    """
    Application service that enforces access-control before returning a
    patient resource to a clinician.
    """

    def __init__(self, repository: PatientRepository):
        self._repo = repository

    def read_patient(self, clinician_id: str, patient_id: str) -> PatientResource:
        """
        Returns the PatientResource if the clinician is assigned to the patient.
        Raises AccessDeniedError otherwise.
        """
        patient = self._repo.get(patient_id)          # raises PatientNotFoundError
        if clinician_id not in patient.assigned_clinician_ids:
            raise AccessDeniedError(
                f"Clinician {clinician_id} is not authorised to read "
                f"patient {patient_id}."
            )
        return patient
